# 셀프 마사지 가이드

> AI-powered self-massage guide that recommends massage techniques based on pain location.

## About

셀프 마사지 가이드 (massage.nukk.net) is a Korean-language web tool built by a physician. Users select a painful body region on an interactive human body map, and the AI provides step-by-step self-massage instructions that can be followed at home.

## Audience

Patients and individuals in South Korea experiencing muscle pain, joint pain, or tension headaches who want guided self-massage relief at home.

## Key Features

- Interactive body map for pain location selection
- AI-generated massage instructions per body region
- Step-by-step guidance in Korean
- Covers common pain areas: neck, shoulders, back, legs, head

## Source

Built by Nukk-pain (nukkpain.vercel.app), a Korean physician-developer.
